<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; use Cocur\Slugify\Slugify; /** * Class PostCustomEngine2. * * A test model that customizes the Slugify engine with other custom rules. */ class PostWithCustomEngine2 extends Post { public function customizeSlugEngine(Slugify $engine, string $attribute): Slugify { return new Slugify(['regexp' => '|[^A-Za-z0-9/]+|']); } }
